calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Renunciation Of Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Remove Testamentary Trust From Continuing Jurisdiction Of The Court
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Raymond Levy in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it could not approve the accounting and that it needed to be done pursuant to the rules of the Court. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR#6213. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Continued To Sep-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Continued To Aug-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-21-2009 Continued To Aug-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Application To Reconsider Compensation To Executor Raymond H. Levy By Order Filed April 4, 2008
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Raymond Levy in Pro Per.

Mr. Levy asked the Court to reconsider the statutory fees and stated that the named Trustee had the right to appoint the successor trustee without a bond. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. RAYMOND LEVY IN PRO PER;

MR. LEVY REPORTED ABOUT STATUTORY FEES AND EXTRAORDINARY FEES AND FOR THE COURT TO WAIVE THE BOND ON THE SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE. HE JUSTIFIED THE EXTRAORDINARY FEES BECAUSE HE IS DEALING WITH A LOT OF PEOPLE, PROPERTY IN FRANCE, FEDERAL TAX RETURN AND NON-CITIZEN ISSUE. THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR 7782. Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy H. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Continued To Apr-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Reform Testamentary Trust
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Raymond Levy as the executor.

The Court modified the order and asked Mr. Levy to review it to see if he had any objections.
Mr. Levy returned at the end of the hearings and the court signed the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mizota.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
